composition.Programmer 1: Fix and enhance main.py to ensure all backend routes correctly render their respective HTML templates. Specifically, address the TemplateNotFound errors for 'dashboard.html' and 'catalog.html' by verifying the render_template calls and ensuring the Flask app is configured to locate templates in the correct 'templates' directory. Maintain all existing functionalities including user data handling, course enrollment, progress tracking, assignment submission, certificate generation, and profile management as per the original requirements document. Coordinate with the frontend developer to confirm the availability and correct placement of all required HTML template files for the nine pages specified in the requirements.
composition.Programmer 2: Develop and implement all missing HTML template files required by the 'OnlineCourse' web application. This includes creating the following templates with the specified elements and functionalities as per the requirements document  dashboard.html, catalog.html, course_details.html, my_courses.html, learning.html, assignments.html, submit_assignment.html, certificates.html, and profile.html. Ensure that each template contains the correct HTML elements with the specified IDs, supports navigation between pages, and integrates with the backend data passed via render_template. Coordinate with the backend developer to ensure template names and expected data structures match the backend render_template calls.
